description_long: This is a round, flat-crowned hat with a low profile and a wide, circular shape. The exterior is covered in a dark red, checkered fabric that gives it a soft, textile appearance. The sides are straight and vertical, with the top surface being broad and flat, suggesting a comfortable fit for the head. There are no visible decorative elements, embellishments, or structural features such as a brim or band. The hat appears to be made primarily of fabric, likely cotton or wool, with a soft, flexible structure. Its simple, unadorned design and checked pattern evoke a casual, utilitarian style suitable for everyday urban wear.
description: A round, flat-crowned hat covered in dark red checkered fabric, with a wide, low profile and no visible decorations. The design is simple and utilitarian, emphasizing comfort and casual style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the round, flat top and straight sides, highlighting the checkered fabric pattern.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizes the wide, flat crown and the low profile of the hat, with the checkered pattern visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the same round, flat top and straight sides with the checkered fabric.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, displaying the wide, flat crown and low profile.
